chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الصَّادِقِ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 70 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Abdullah Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> Bin Muhammad Al-Sadiq<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/328)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/328)
text: سُئِلَ عَنِ الْقَائِمِ ( عليه السلام ) فَضَرَبَ بِيَدِهِ عَلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ هَذَا وَ اللَّهِ قَائِمُ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله )
قَالَ عَنْبَسَةُ فَلَمَّا قُبِضَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) دَخَلْتُ عَلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَأَخْبَرْتُهُ بِذَلِكَ فَقَالَ صَدَقَ جَابِرٌ
ثُمَّ قَالَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَرَوْنَ أَنْ لَيْسَ كُلُّ إِمَامٍ هُوَ الْقَائِمَ بَعْدَ الْإِمَامِ الَّذِي كَانَ قَبْلَهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Hisham Bin Salim, from Jabir Bin Yazeed Al Ju’fy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘He<sup>asws</sup> was asked about Al-Qaim<sup>asws</sup>. So he<sup>asws</sup> struck his<sup>asws</sup> hand upon Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> and he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This one<sup>asws</sup>, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, is a Qaim<sup>asws</sup> of the Progeny of Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>’.

Anbasa (a narrator) said, ‘So when Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> passed away, I went over to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> and I informed him<sup>asws</sup> with that. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Jabir (the narrator) spoke the truth’.

Then he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Perhaps you all are viewing that it isn’t so. Every Imam<sup>asws</sup>, he<sup>asws</sup> is Al-Qaim<sup>asws</sup> after the Imam<sup>asws</sup> who was before him<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 7. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Mahbub from Hisham ibn Salim from Jabur ibn Yazid al-Ju‘fiy who has said the following. “A question was asked (from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) about al-Qa’im (the twelfth Imam (a.s.). He (abu Ja‘far) tapped (at the shoulder of) abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) and said, “This, by Allah, is the Qa’im (one who will establish the kingdom of Allah) of the family of Muhammad (s.a.).” ‘Anbasa has said, “when abu Ja‘far passed away, went to see abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) and told him of what I had heard (from Jabur). The Imam (a.s.) said, “Jabur has spoken the truth.” He then said, “You perhaps think that the every succeeding Imam after a preceding Imam is not al-Qa’im (also meaning the one who obeys and serves Allah).”
